title: Tree Builder
description: Using a wand, create huge random generated trees in seconds to decorate your world and polish them with the wand!
body:
# Tree builder

_Progressively and randomly generates a tree; decide how big and wide it will be; control where each branches should be and let it expand randomly creating more branches and leaves, all of this using a single wand and stoppable at any moment using a single command!_

## Commands to use to get the wand and stop the generating process:

**/function tree_builder:wand**

- Run this command to get the tree builder wand
- You can use the wand by right clicking, and you may want to click at several spots during the process to control how big it will be. Leaves and logs will generate where you click infinetly til you run the next command:

**/function tree_builder:stop_trees_generation**

- Run this command to stop the generation of random trees
